creator: fbsd-ports@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

New version of the patch, for new version of databases/cego, see below.

diff -r -u databases/cego/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile
--- databases/cego/Makefile	2012-11-25 20:43:56.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile	2012-12-18 22:17:53.000000000 +0100
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.52 2012/11/25 19:43:56 svnexp Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.14.1
+PORTVERSION=	2.15.1
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 
diff -r -u databases/cego/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo
--- databases/cego/distinfo	2012-12-16 12:18:47.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo	2012-12-18 22:17:58.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cego-2.14.1.tar.gz) = 81b355b7dfd6854569a3473345adbbcecde06926b69a3e0df430e67236707cb4
-SIZE (cego-2.14.1.tar.gz) = 654738
+SHA256 (cego-2.15.1.tar.gz) = 112097040ca130250f56c517437da95bd6b076fa67a8eb40058bb3f0554bb25a
+SIZE (cego-2.15.1.tar.gz) = 615097

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         8 years to go !
